data.title: McGwire Bonds Canseco Bo Jackson 7-Card Lot 1980s 1990s Home Run Era
data.description:
Seven cards from the players who defined the home run chase era — McGwire, Bonds, Canseco, and Bo Jackson. This is pure nostalgia for anyone who grew up watching these guys mash. Bo's got crossover appeal if you're also collecting his football cards.

Cards | 7 total
Players | Mark McGwire, Barry Bonds, Jose Canseco, Bo Jackson
Years | 1980s-1990s
Condition | Good overall

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: 7 cards total. McGwire, Bonds, Canseco, and Bo Jackson from the 1980s-90s. Good condition overall — typical handling for the era, no major damage. See photos for specifics on each card.
